===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Cilan JN.png|thumb|250px|Cilan in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
{{main|Cilan (anime)}}
Cilan is one of [[Ash Ketchum]]'s {{ashfr|traveling partner}}s in ''[[Pokémon the Series: Black & White]]''. He was one of the Gym Leaders of the [[Striaton Gym]], as well as a [[Pokémon Connoisseur]], but he decided to travel with Ash and {{an|Iris}} so that he could experience different people, places, and Pokémon to increase his skill as a Connoisseur, instead of being confined to Striaton City. He navigates the group to their various locations, as well as cooks the meals.
